name: bulk3tocmake
description: Bulk convert ModusToolbox 3.x workspace directories to CMake projects

scripts.pkg:win11: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../bin/win11/bulk3tocmake.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output ../bin/linux/bulk3tocmake
scripts.pkg:macos: npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-x64 --output ../bin/macos/bulk3tocmake
scripts.pkg:all: npm run pkg:win11 && npm run pkg:linux && npm run pkg:macos
